product.title: Fitness Tracker No Bluetooth No App/Phone Required, Fitness Watch for Men Women
product.shortDescription: You don't need to go hassle to download an app or connect it to your phone to get it started. It is very light and comfortable, and it will be a great gift for parents. It has two exercise modes, including walking and running.
product.description:
• Fitness Tracker without Bluetooth/Smartphone: This fitness tracker can work independently without any App. You don't need to go hassle to download an app or connect it to your phone to get it started. It is very suitable for people who want a simple fitness tracker that can work without a cell phone. It is very light and comfortable, and it will be a great gift for parents
  • Accurate Activity Tracker Watch: This fitness watch can accurately record your steps, calories burned, distance and sleep time. It has two exercise modes, including walking and running. It can help you to stay active and develop a healthy lifestyle.
  • 1.47-Inch Full Touch Screen: This pedometer watch is equipped with a 1.47-inch full touch screen, which makes the operation of the watch very simple. You can swipe and tap the screen to operate. After received the watch, you need to set the time, date, your height/weight/age in the settings menu to get it started.
  • IP68 Waterproof & Long Lasting: The fitness watch is IP68 waterproof, you can wash your hands and swim while wearing the watch. The watch is charged through the magnetic charging cable, it only takes 2 hours to fully charge, and it can be used for 7 days.
  • More Useful Tools: This no bluetooth fitness watch has many useful functions, such as alarm clocks, stopwatch, timer and sedentary reminder. You can also adjust the screen brightness to meet your need of different usage scenarios.

Product description

Accurate Fitness Tracker

Our fitness tracker watch adopts the latest sensors and more accurate motion tracking algorithm, which can calculate your steps, distance, and calories more accurately and faster. You can check the corresponding data on the watch at any time. And the watch supports both Walk and Run a movement pattern, it helps you better understand your daily physical activity.

Sleep Monitor

This activity watch can record your sleep data, it can help you to adjust and improve your sleep habits.

(The sleep function of the watch needs to be turned on manually. When you turn on this function before going to bed, you can see your sleep data when you wake up the next day.)

1.47‘’ Large Touch Screen

This watch is equipped with a 1.47‘’ full touch screen, which supports clicking and sliding the screen to switch the function interface and menu of the watch, and the high-definition large screen can show the data to you more clearly.

Easy to Use

The operation of the watch is very simple, you can tap and swipe the screen, and there is a physical button on the side of the watch for some quick operations. After received the watch, you need to set the time, date, height, weight, and age in the settings menu to get it started. (The watch will automatically reset the sports data of the day at 12:00 every night.)

More Functions

The watch has five dials that can be replaced, and it has other very practical functions, such as turning the wrist to brighten the screen, sedentary reminder, drinking water reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, timer, etc., it also supports adjusting the brightness and brightness of the watch. screen time.

Great Gift

This pedometer watch is a very good gift choice for the elderly, as it is easier to see the data clearly on the large screen and simple to use and can work without a phone, no need to connect, no app needed, also it is very light and comfortable to wear.

FAQ:

Q1: Does this watch need to be connected to a mobile phone and App to use?

No, our fitness tracker is designed without bluetooth, it does not need to connect mobile phone and app, no EMF, it can be used completely alone.

Q2: How to set the watch?

After receiving the watch, you need to set the time, date, height, weight, and age in the settings menu to get it started.

(You can tap and swipe the screen to use it, and there is a physical button on the side of the watch for some quick operations)

Q3: How to activate(turn on) and charge the watch?

It needs to be charged to activate the watch when it is started for the first time. The watch is charged via a magnetic charging cable and can be fully charged in two hours. In the case of daily use, the watch can be used about 5 days. (The method of daily turn-on: Press and hold the function button for 3-5 seconds to turn it on.)

Q4: How to get accurate activity data?

1. Please enter your personal information accurately in the setting of the watch;

2. When testing, please put the watch close to the skin and wear it tightly;

3. Because this watch has a built-in 3D sensor, which is more sensitive, so it is recommended that you swing the arm smoothly when you walk;

4. You can test it several times.

Q5: Will my personal information on the watch always be saved?

No, if the watch is out of battery, all the setting information will be cleared. So we suggest that charge the watch in time when the watch is low battery.

Q6: How to get accurate calories？

Calories are calculated based on the two main datas, personal information and exercise steps. Please make sure your personal information (birthday, gender, height, weight and step length) is set up accurately in the watch, so the watch can count your calories correctly. (Settings->Personal Information).

2. Please ignore the device in the Bluetooth device, set path: iPhone phones: Phone Settings → Bluetooth → Click the icon on the right ⓘ → Ignore this device, then return to the "DAFit " App to search for the device again. Android phones: Phone Settings → Bluetooth → Paired Devices→ Click the icon on the right → Unpair , then return to the "DAFit " App to search for the device again.

3. If it is an iPhone, check if there are too many Bluetooth devices bound to the phone, please ignore several devices in the system Bluetooth settings.

4. If you still cannot bind after several attempts, it is recommended to pair and connect in an open place to avoid interference from other devices during the pairing process.

Note: If the above operation fails to solve the problem. It is recommended to try restarting the bluetooth or the phone.

2. Android phones: Phone Settings → Bluetooth → Paired Devices→ Click the icon on the right → Unpair , then return to the "DAFit " App to search for the device again.

Reviews.comment: Love this watch — Alexa integration works surprisingly well and the Bluetooth calling is clear. Battery lasts about 6 days for me. Stylish Rose Gold looks great.
Great fitness tracker features and accurate heart rate during workouts. The DaFit app took a minute to set up but overall happy.
Screen is bright and touch responsive. Speaker volume is impressive for phone calls. Wish the strap options were more varied out of the box.
Good hardware and solid build, but notifications sometimes lag and the weather forecast sync is spotty.
Decent smartwatch for the price. Blood oxygen and pressure readings are convenient but not medical-grade — take with caution.
Battery dropped faster than advertised after a month of heavy use. Still okay for casual users but disappointed.
I like the waterproof feature for swimming and the 100+ sport modes. The magnetic charger is handy and charges quickly.
App connectivity is unreliable on my Android phone and Bluetooth calls drop occasionally. Had higher expectations.
Excellent value — clear display, responsive touchscreen, and the intelligent voice assistant is useful when driving.
Comfortable silicone band and good build (PVD metal). Sleep tracking seems accurate, though step count can be slightly off.
Received with a small scratch on the bezel and customer service was slow to respond. Functionality is okay otherwise.
Bluetooth 5.0 pairing is fast and the high-power speakerphone makes calls easy. DaFit app has many watch faces to choose from.
